mapper.delete: DELETE FROM employee_additions WHERE CONVERT(DATE, sync_date) = CONVERT(DATE, #{syncDate})
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO employee_additions(employees_id, sync_date, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.employeesId}, #{item.syncDate}, GETDATE())
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT employees_id FROM employee_additions WHERE CONVERT(DATE, sync_date) IN
CONVERT(DATE, #{syncDate})
